requirement_topic.en: PROCEL / ENCE Mandatory Energy Label — Efficiency Grade Before Sale
requirement_topic.zh: PROCEL / ENCE强制能效标签——销售前能效等级
requirement_topic.zht: PROCEL / ENCE強制能效標籤——銷售前能效等級

summary.en: Brazil requires applicable heat-pump air conditioners and similar cooling or heating equipment to use the national energy-efficiency labelling route, including the ENCE label and PROCEL-linked efficiency disclosure where applicable. The product must be classified under Brazil test methods and display the required grade, such as A to G or a star-style rating where the current program uses it, before retail sale or importer distribution.
summary.zh: 巴西要求适用的热泵空调及类似制冷或制热设备采用国家能效标签路径，包括ENCE标签及适用时的PROCEL相关能效披露。产品须按巴西测试方法分类，并在零售销售或进口商分销前显示所需等级，例如A至G或现行项目采用的星级形式。
summary.zht: 巴西要求適用的熱泵空調及類似制冷或製熱設備採用國家能效標籤路徑，包括ENCE標籤及適用時的PROCEL相關能效披露。產品須按巴西測試方法分類，並在零售銷售或進口商分銷前顯示所需等級，例如A至G或現行項目採用的星級形式。

standards_or_laws: ENCE energy conservation label for applicable air-conditioning equipment
PROCEL energy efficiency disclosure for applicable products

summary.en: Chinese heat pumps and air conditioners commonly declare COP, SCOP, APF, or seasonal values under GB 25454 and GB/T 7725, with China Energy Label information where applicable. These values are not automatically equivalent to Brazil ENCE classification or PROCEL disclosure formats.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调通常按GB 25454和GB/T 7725声明COP、SCOP、APF或季节性能效，并在适用时使用中国能效标识信息。这些数值不能自动等同于巴西ENCE分类或PROCEL披露格式。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調通常按GB 25454和GB/T 7725聲明COP、SCOP、APF或季節性能效，並在適用時使用中國能效標識資訊。這些數值不能自動等同於巴西ENCE分類或PROCEL披露格式。

gap.en: The efficiency gap is method and label format. China COP or SCOP values should be treated as engineering inputs only; Brazil requires local category selection, energy-test evidence, ENCE label artwork and registration data, and sale-facing Portuguese information. A China Energy Label cannot be pasted onto Brazil retail packaging.
gap.zh: 能效差距在测试方法和标签格式。中国COP或SCOP数值仅应作为工程输入；巴西需要本地品类选择、能效测试证据、ENCE标签图样和注册数据，以及面向销售的葡萄牙语信息。中国能效标识不能直接贴用于巴西零售包装。
gap.zht: 能效差距在測試方法和標籤格式。中國COP或SCOP數值僅應作為工程輸入；巴西需要本地品類選擇、能效測試證據、ENCE標籤圖樣和註冊資料，以及面向銷售的葡萄牙語資訊。中國能效標識不能直接貼用於巴西零售包裝。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory before sale for applicable labelled air-conditioning and heat-pump categories
mandatory_status.cn: China energy efficiency declarations mandatory where China scheme applies; not equivalent to Brazil ENCE / PROCEL label

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — ENCE / PROCEL energy labelling must be completed in Brazil format before sale; Chinese GB efficiency data is only a starting input.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——销售前须按巴西格式完成ENCE / PROCEL能效标签；中国GB能效数据仅是起点资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——銷售前須按巴西格式完成ENCE / PROCEL能效標籤；中國GB能效資料僅是起點資料。

requirement_topic.en: Brazil Grid Design Inputs — 60 Hz and 127 V / 220 V Voltage Variation
requirement_topic.zh: 巴西电网设计输入——60 Hz及127 V / 220 V电压差异
requirement_topic.zht: 巴西電網設計輸入——60 Hz及127 V / 220 V電壓差異

summary.en: Brazil uses 60 Hz supply, and single-phase voltage can be 127 V or 220 V depending on state, city, and installation context. Heat pumps designed for China 50 Hz operation require electrical redesign or validated 60 Hz operation, motor and compressor review, control-board and fan evaluation, protection-device review, nameplate changes, and Brazil-specific installation instructions before certification and energy testing.
summary.zh: 巴西采用60 Hz供电，单相电压可因州、市和安装场景不同而为127 V或220 V。按中国50 Hz运行设计的热泵，在认证和能效测试前需要电气重设计或验证60 Hz运行，审查电机和压缩机、控制板和风机、保护器件，修改铭牌，并准备巴西特定安装说明。
summary.zht: 巴西採用60 Hz供電，單相電壓可因州、市和安裝場景不同而為127 V或220 V。按中國50 Hz運行設計的熱泵，在認證和能效測試前需要電氣重設計或驗證60 Hz運行，審查馬達和壓縮機、控制板和風機、保護器件，修改銘牌，並準備巴西特定安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: Brazil 127 V / 220 V local voltage configuration
INMETRO testing and nameplate documentation for rated electrical input

summary.en: China domestic heat pumps are commonly designed around China 50 Hz grid conditions and Chinese rated-voltage assumptions, with performance and safety evidence under GB 25454, GB/T 7725, CCC, and GB 9237. Those files do not prove 60 Hz Brazil operation or correct state-by-state voltage configuration.
summary.zh: 中国内销热泵通常围绕中国50 Hz电网条件和中国额定电压假设设计，并按GB 25454、GB/T 7725、CCC和GB 9237形成性能与安全证据。这些文件不能证明巴西60 Hz运行或按州、市配置正确电压。
summary.zht: 中國內銷熱泵通常圍繞中國50 Hz電網條件和中國額定電壓假設設計，並按GB 25454、GB/T 7725、CCC和GB 9237形成性能與安全證據。這些文件不能證明巴西60 Hz運行或按州、市配置正確電壓。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory for heat pumps at or below 40 kW where in scope

gap.en: This is a critical engineering gap, not only a label change. A 50 Hz China model may have different compressor speed, fan load, heating capacity, safety margins, energy rating, and reliability at Brazil 60 Hz. The product family should be split by Brazil voltage configuration and validated before INMETRO / ENCE submission.
gap.zh: 这是关键工程差距，不只是标签更改。50 Hz中国型号在巴西60 Hz下可能出现压缩机转速、风机负载、制热能力、安全裕度、能效等级和可靠性差异。产品系列应按巴西电压配置拆分，并在提交INMETRO / ENCE前完成验证。
gap.zht: 這是關鍵工程差距，不只是標籤更改。50 Hz中國型號在巴西60 Hz下可能出現壓縮機轉速、風機負載、製熱能力、安全裕度、能效等級和可靠性差異。產品系列應按巴西電壓配置拆分，並在提交INMETRO / ENCE前完成驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory design and rating input for Brazil certification, energy testing, nameplate, and installation suitability
mandatory_status.cn: China 50 Hz design evidence may be mandatory for China market but does not validate Brazil 60 Hz or 127 V / 220 V configurations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Critical gap — Brazil is 60 Hz with 127 V or 220 V local variation; China 50 Hz heat pumps should be redesigned or validated before certification and sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 关键差距——巴西为60 Hz且存在127 V或220 V地区差异；中国50 Hz热泵应在认证和销售前重设计或验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 關鍵差距——巴西為60 Hz且存在127 V或220 V地區差異；中國50 Hz熱泵應在認證和銷售前重設計或驗證。
